creator: sander@haldjas.folklore.ee
text:
A number of problems:

	1) The PLIST isnsists that anband is installed in 
	   lib/X11/angband, but inreality it is installed
	   in lib/angband
	2) package seems to not install the apex/ subdirectory
	3) At least one file needed, f_info.raw is missing from
	   the package/angband is unable to find it - the result
	   being that it refuses to run.

Fix: 

Unknown at this point of time.
How-To-Repeat: 
Ftp angband-2.8.1 package, install and try to run it.
